task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the required bookmark folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Bookmark Manager or Bookmarks Bar showing the folders: 'Suppliers & Ordering', 'Food Safety & Compliance', 'POS & Finance', 'Staff & Scheduling', 'Marketing & Reviews', and 'Personal - Previous Manager'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 3 custom search engine shortcuts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings -> 'Search engine' -> 'Manage search engines and site search' showing custom entries with shortcuts 'sysco', 'recipe', and 'safety'.

task_completion.description: Verify the homepage and startup pages are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings showing the Homepage set to a toasttab.com URL, and 'On startup' set to open specific pages including toasttab.com, 7shifts.com, and sysco.com.

task_completion.description: Verify the download directory is configured to the Restaurant_Files folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings -> 'Downloads' showing the Location path ending in 'Restaurant_Files' (specifically /home/ga/Documents/Restaurant_Files).

task_completion.description: Verify privacy and security settings (third-party cookies blocked, password saving disabled).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings -> 'Privacy and security' showing 'Block third-party cookies' selected, and Chrome Password Manager settings showing 'Offer to save passwords' toggled off.

task_completion.description: Verify the summary log was written to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '~/Desktop/browser_config_log.txt' summarizing the browser configurations.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings rather than directly modifying the JSON Preferences/Bookmarks files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Chrome browser settings pages and bookmark manager open and being actively interacted with.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually wrote the summary log rather than just renaming the standard text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The log file 'browser_config_log.txt' is seen being typed out in a text editor or created via terminal commands, and its content is a summary rather than an exact copy of 'restaurant_browser_standard.txt'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script to automatically inject settings into Chrome.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands running python or bash scripts that directly edit '~/.config/google-chrome/Default/Preferences' or the 'Bookmarks' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folders: 'Suppliers & Ordering', 'Food Safety & Compliance', 'POS & Finance', 'Staff & Scheduling', 'Marketing & Reviews'. Expected custom search engine shortcuts: 'sysco', 'recipe', 'safety'. Expected homepage: 'toasttab.com' (or https://pos.toasttab.com). Expected startup URLs: 'toasttab.com', '7shifts.com', 'sysco.com'. Expected download directory: '/home/ga/Documents/Restaurant_Files'.
